page_title: If a cause is worth dying for then be
text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 2 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
Brave as the bravest
Great as the greatest
Strong as the strongest
Hard as the hardest

No lack of courage
No lack and ruin
No room for pity
No dissolution

If a cause is worth dying for then be
